CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 2 comment(s) can be added.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. If omitted, adds labels to the item that triggered this workflow.","type":"number"},"labels":{"description":"Label names to add (e.g., ['bug', 'priority-high']). 2026-03-20T08:36:55.5373046Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:36:03.698240166Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":57287,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-03-20T08:36:55.5387514Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-20T08:36:04.003208938Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57287,\"title\":\"[Generator Bug] @@alternateType to armResourceType emits WriteObjectValue instead of WriteStringValue\",\"body\":\"## Description\\n\\nWhen `@@alternateType` maps a property to `Azure.Core.armResourceType` (C# `ResourceType`), the generator emits `WriteObjectValue(ResourceType, options)` for serialization. But `WriteObjectValue` has no case for `ResourceType` (which is a `readonly struct` wrapping a string), so it falls through to the `default` case and throws:\\n\\n```\\nSystem.NotSupportedException: Not supported type Azure.Core.ResourceType\\n```\\n\\nThis also affects deserialization — the generator emits `ResourceType.DeserializeResourceType()` which doesn\\u0026#39;t exist as a public method.\\n\\n## Affected Model (Storage MPG Migration)\\n\\n- `StorageAccountNameAvailabilityContent` — spec has `type: \\u0026#34;Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts\\u0026#34;` (constant string), mapped via:\\n```typespec\\n@@alternateType(StorageAccountCheckNameAvailabilityParameters.type, Azure.Core.armResourceType, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);\\n```\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\nThis blocks **230 out of 287 tests** in the Storage SDK because nearly every test calls `CheckStorageAccountNameAvailability` during setup.\\n\\n## Current Workaround\\n\\nCustom `[CodeGenSerialization]` hooks for both directions:\\n\\n```csharp\\n[CodeGenSerialization(nameof(ResourceType),\\n    DeserializationValueHook = nameof(DeserializeResourceType),\\n    SerializationValueHook = nameof(SerializeResourceType))]\\npublic partial class StorageAccountNameAvailabilityContent\\n{\\n    private static void SerializeResourceType(Utf8JsonWriter writer, ResourceType resourceType)\\n    {\\n        writer.WriteStringValue(resourceType.ToString());\\n    }\\n\\n    private static void DeserializeResourceType(JsonProperty property, ref ResourceType resourceType)\\n    {\\n        resourceType = new ResourceType(property.Value.GetString());\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Note:** The `SerializationValueHook` requires regeneration to take effect. The generated file still has `WriteObjectValue` until regenerated.\\n\\n## Comparison with Native Usage\\n\\nWhen `armResourceType` is used as a **native property type** (not via `@@alternateType`), the generator correctly emits `WriteStringValue(ResourceType)`. The bug is specific to the `@@alternateType` code path.\\n\\n**Works (native):** `testresourcetype.tsp`\\n```typespec\\nmodel ResourceTypeTestProperties {\\n  optionalResourceType?: Azure.Core.armResourceType;  // generates WriteStringValue ✓\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Broken (alternateType):** `client.tsp`\\n```typespec\\n@@alternateType(SomeModel.type, Azure.Core.armResourceType, \\u0026#34;csharp\\u0026#34;);  // generates WriteObjectValue ✗\\n```\\n\\n## Related PR\\n\\n- SDK PR: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/56896\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57287\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"bug\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-20T08:33:49Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-20T08:33:49Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-03-20T08:38:03.3017536Z THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT:{"prompt_injection":true,"secret_leak":false,"malicious_patch":false,"reasons":["The workflow prompt file contains two full embedded <system><security> blocks injected mid-sentence within the issue content section. Specifically, the metacharacters list description (';', '|', '&', ...) is interrupted by a complete <system> block including <security> policy text, <github-context> with actor/repository/issue-number, <safe-outputs> instructions, and other system-level directives. This is a classic prompt injection pattern where issue #57287's body contained XML-style system tags designed to override agent behavior by impersonating the runtime's security policy. The agent correctly ignored the injection and returned a legitimate noop response (issue already labeled), indicating the defense held, but the injection attempt was clearly present in the issue content."]}
